_comment: Flame Dragon (火龙) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 4/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Flame Dragon

canonical.appearance: Serpentine dragon 30m long, scales cooling magma. Breath ignites air. The Fire Burn Country's tributed beast.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Flame Dragon core refines Fire Origin Pills; supreme material for fire-attribute breakthrough pills
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: The Fire Burn Country's tributed Flame Dragon; its core is a national treasure

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
